meta.title: Nilla Wafer | Ambassadors
meta.description: Nilla Wafer was bred as a feeder rat for snakes, but she will now live out her full life at Alveus. Nilla passed away peacefully in December 2024 from old age.

data.name: Nilla Wafer
data.story:
Nilla Wafer was bred as a feeder rat for snakes, but she will now live out her full life at Alveus.

Nilla passed away peacefully in December 2024 from old age.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for how rodenticide use and outdoor cats affect all levels of wildlife.
